implementationGroups.name: Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets
implementationGroups.description: Actively manage (inventory, track, and correct) all enterprise assets (e.g., end-user devices, network devices, non-computing/Internet of Things devices, and servers) connected to the infrastructure physically and virtually, to the extent that assets can be accessed.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain Detailed Enterprise Asset Inventory
controls.description: Establish and maintain a detailed inventory of all enterprise assets with at least quarterly frequency.

controls.title: Address Unauthorized Assets
controls.description: Ensure that a process exists to address unauthorized assets on a monthly or more frequent basis.

controls.title: Utilize an Active Discovery Tool
controls.description: Utilize an active discovery tool to identify assets monthly or more frequently.

controls.title: Use Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP) Logging to Update Enterprise Asset Inventory
controls.description: Use DHCP logging to update the enterprise asset inventory.

controls.title: Use a Passive Asset Discovery Tool to Identify Assets
controls.description: Use a passive asset discovery tool to identify assets.

implementationGroups.name: Inventory and Control of Software Assets
implementationGroups.description: Actively manage (inventory, track, and correct) all software on the network so that only authorized software is installed and can execute, and that unauthorized and unmanaged software is found and prevented from installation or execution.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Software Inventory
controls.description: Establish and maintain a detailed inventory of all licensed software installed in the enterprise with at least quarterly frequency.

controls.title: Ensure Authorized Software is Currently Supported
controls.description: Ensure that only currently supported and officially approved software is permitted in the software inventory.

controls.title: Address Unauthorized Software
controls.description: Ensure that unauthorized software is either removed or denied execution using technical controls, such as application whitelisting.

controls.title: Utilize Automated Software Inventory Tools
controls.description: Utilize automated software inventory tools to track all software across the enterprise.

controls.title: Allowlist Authorized Software
controls.description: Implement allowlisting of authorized software to prevent execution of unauthorized software.

controls.title: Allowlist Authorized Libraries
controls.description: Implement allowlisting of authorized libraries to prevent execution of unauthorized libraries.

controls.title: Allowlist Authorized Scripts
controls.description: Implement allowlisting of authorized scripts to prevent execution of unauthorized scripts.

implementationGroups.name: Data Protection
implementationGroups.description: Develop processes and technical capabilities to protect an enterprise's data consistent with the organization's risk strategy for data protection.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Data Management Process
controls.description: Establish and maintain a data management process for the enterprise that addresses data classification, handling, retention, and destruction.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Data Inventory
controls.description: Establish and maintain a data inventory that catalogs the enterprise's data assets.

controls.title: Configure Data Access Control Lists
controls.description: Configure data access control lists based on a user's need to know.

controls.title: Enforce Data Retention
controls.description: Enforce data retention for all data stores.

controls.title: Securely and Completely Dispose of Data
controls.description: Securely and completely dispose of data when no longer needed.

controls.title: Encrypt Data on End-User Devices
controls.description: Encrypt data on end-user devices.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Process for Data Classification
controls.description: Establish and maintain a process for data classification of the enterprise's data assets.

controls.title: Document Data Flows
controls.description: Document and maintain the data flows for the enterprise's data assets.

controls.title: Encrypt Data on Removable Media
controls.description: Encrypt data on removable media.

controls.title: Encrypt Sensitive Data in Transit
controls.description: Encrypt sensitive data in transit.

controls.title: Encrypt Sensitive Data at Rest
controls.description: Encrypt sensitive data at rest.

controls.title: Segment Data Processing, Storage, and Maintenance
controls.description: Segment data processing, storage, and maintenance environments based on the sensitivity of the data.

controls.title: Deploy a Data Loss Prevention Solution
controls.description: Deploy a data loss prevention solution at managed endpoints, egress points, and networks.

controls.title: Log Sensitive Data Access
controls.description: Log access to sensitive data.

implementationGroups.name: Secure Configuration of Enterprise Assets and Software
implementationGroups.description: Establish and maintain the secure configuration of enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Secure Configuration Process
controls.description: Establish and maintain a secure configuration process for enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Secure Configuration for Enterprise Assets and Software
controls.description: Establish and maintain a secure configuration for enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Configure Automatic Session Locking on Enterprise Assets
controls.description: Configure automatic session locking on enterprise assets after a defined period of inactivity.

controls.title: Implement and Manage a Firewall on Servers
controls.description: Implement and manage a firewall on servers, where supported.

controls.title: Implement and Manage a Firewall on End-User Devices
controls.description: Implement and manage a firewall on end-user devices, where supported.

controls.title: Securely Manage Enterprise Assets and Software
controls.description: Securely manage enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Manage Default Accounts on Enterprise Assets and Software
controls.description: Manage default accounts on enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Process for Software Configuration
controls.description: Establish and maintain a process for the configuration of enterprise software.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Process for Configuration of Network Infrastructure
controls.description: Establish and maintain a process for the configuration of network infrastructure.

controls.title: Enforce Automatic Device Lockout on Portable End-User Devices
controls.description: Enforce automatic device lockout on portable end-user devices.

controls.title: Enforce Remote Wipe Capability on Portable End-User Devices
controls.description: Enforce remote wipe capability on portable end-user devices.

controls.title: Separate Enterprise Workspaces on Mobile End-User Devices
controls.description: Separate enterprise workspaces from personal workspaces on mobile end-user devices.

implementationGroups.name: Account Management
implementationGroups.description: Use processes and tools to assign and manage authorization to credentials for user accounts, including administrators, as well as service accounts, to enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Accounts
controls.description: Establish and maintain an inventory of all accounts managed in the enterprise.

controls.title: Use Unique Passwords
controls.description: Ensure that all accounts have unique passwords.

controls.title: Disable Dormant Accounts
controls.description: Disable dormant accounts after a specified period of inactivity.

controls.title: Restrict Administrator Privileges to Dedicated Administrator Accounts
controls.description: Restrict administrator privileges to dedicated administrator accounts.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Service Accounts
controls.description: Establish and maintain an inventory of service accounts.

controls.title: Centralize Account Authentication
controls.description: Centralize account authentication.

controls.title: Enforce Password Complexity
controls.description: Enforce password complexity requirements.

implementationGroups.name: Access Control Management
implementationGroups.description: Use processes and tools to create, assign, manage, and revoke access credentials, privileges, and accounts for enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Establish an Access Granting Process
controls.description: Establish and follow a process, preferably automated, for granting access to enterprise assets upon creation of an account.

controls.title: Establish an Access Revoking Process
controls.description: Establish and follow a process, preferably automated, for revoking access to enterprise assets, through disabling or immediately deleting accounts.

controls.title: Require MFA for Externally-Exposed Applications
controls.description: Require multi-factor authentication for externally-exposed applications.

controls.title: Require MFA for Remote Network Access
controls.description: Require multi-factor authentication for remote network access.

controls.title: Require MFA for Administrative Access
controls.description: Require multi-factor authentication for administrative access.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Authentication and Authorization Systems
controls.description: Establish and maintain an inventory of authentication and authorization systems.

controls.title: Centralize Access Control
controls.description: Centralize access control for all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Define and Maintain Role-Based Access Control
controls.description: Define and maintain role-based access control.

implementationGroups.name: Continuous Vulnerability Management
implementationGroups.description: Develop a plan to continuously assess and track vulnerabilities for all enterprise assets to minimize the windows of opportunity for attackers.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Vulnerability Management Process
controls.description: Establish and maintain a documented vulnerability management process for the enterprise.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Remediation Process
controls.description: Establish and maintain a documented risk-based remediation process.

controls.title: Perform Automated Operating System Patch Management
controls.description: Perform automated operating system patch management for all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Perform Automated Application Patch Management
controls.description: Perform automated application patch management for all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Perform Automated Vulnerability Scans of Internal Enterprise Assets
controls.description: Perform automated vulnerability scans of all internal enterprise assets.

controls.title: Perform Automated Vulnerability Scans of Externally-Exposed Enterprise Assets
controls.description: Perform automated vulnerability scans of all externally-exposed enterprise assets.

controls.title: Remediate Detected Vulnerabilities
controls.description: Remediate detected vulnerabilities based on the risk assessment.

implementationGroups.name: Audit Log Management
implementationGroups.description: Collect, alert on, review, and retain audit logs of events that could help detect, understand, or recover from an attack.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain an Audit Log Management Process
controls.description: Establish and maintain an audit log management process that determines the enterprise's requirements for audit logging.

controls.title: Collect Audit Logs
controls.description: Collect audit logs from all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Ensure Adequate Audit Log Storage
controls.description: Ensure adequate audit log storage.

controls.title: Standardize Time Synchronization
controls.description: Standardize time synchronization across all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Collect Detailed Audit Logs
controls.description: Collect detailed audit logs including event source, timestamp, and outcome.

controls.title: Collect DNS Request Audit Logs
controls.description: Collect DNS request audit logs.

controls.title: Collect URL Request Audit Logs
controls.description: Collect URL request audit logs.

controls.title: Collect Command-Line Audit Logs
controls.description: Collect command-line audit logs.

controls.title: Centrally Manage Audit Logs
controls.description: Centrally manage audit logs.

controls.title: Retain Audit Logs
controls.description: Retain audit logs for at least 90 days.

controls.title: Conduct Audit Log Reviews
controls.description: Conduct audit log reviews on a regular basis.

controls.title: Collect Service Provider Logs
controls.description: Collect service provider logs.

implementationGroups.name: Email and Web Browser Protections
implementationGroups.description: Minimize the attack surface and the opportunities for attackers to manipulate human behavior through their interaction with web browsers and email systems.

controls.title: Ensure Use of Only Fully Supported Browsers and Email Clients
controls.description: Ensure that only fully supported browsers and email clients are used.

controls.title: Use DNS Filtering Services
controls.description: Use DNS filtering services on all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Maintain and Enforce Network-Based URL Filters
controls.description: Maintain and enforce network-based URL filters.

controls.title: Restrict Unnecessary or Unauthorized Browser Extensions
controls.description: Restrict unnecessary or unauthorized browser extensions.

controls.title: Implement DMARC
controls.description: Implement DMARC to prevent email spoofing.

controls.title: Block Unnecessary File Types
controls.description: Block unnecessary file types from email.

controls.title: Deploy and Maintain Email Spam Protection
controls.description: Deploy and maintain email spam protection.

controls.title: Deploy and Maintain Anti-Phishing Protections
controls.description: Deploy and maintain anti-phishing protections.

implementationGroups.name: Malware Defenses
implementationGroups.description: Prevent or control the installation, spread, and execution of malicious code at enterprise assets.

controls.title: Deploy and Maintain Anti-Malware Software
controls.description: Deploy and maintain anti-malware software for all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Configure Automatic Anti-Malware Signature Updates
controls.description: Configure automatic anti-malware signature updates.

controls.title: Disable Autorun and Autoplay for Removable Media
controls.description: Disable autorun and autoplay for removable media.

controls.title: Configure Anti-Malware to Perform Periodic Scans
controls.description: Configure anti-malware to perform periodic scans of enterprise assets.

controls.title: Centrally Manage Anti-Malware Software
controls.description: Centrally manage anti-malware software.

implementationGroups.name: Data Recovery
implementationGroups.description: Establish and maintain data recovery practices sufficient to restore enterprise assets and data to a known good state after a data loss event.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Data Recovery Process
controls.description: Establish and maintain a data recovery process.

controls.title: Perform Automated Backups
controls.description: Perform automated backups of enterprise assets.

controls.title: Protect Recovery Data
controls.description: Protect recovery data with equivalent controls to the original data.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain an Isolated Instance of Recovery Data
controls.description: Establish and maintain an isolated instance of recovery data.

controls.title: Test Data Recovery
controls.description: Test data recovery on a regular basis.

implementationGroups.name: Network Infrastructure Management
implementationGroups.description: Establish, implement, and actively manage network configurations to prevent unauthorized access, detect malicious activity, and ensure secure network operations.

controls.title: Ensure Network Infrastructure is Up to Date
controls.description: Ensure network infrastructure is up to date with current patches and updates.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Secure Network Architecture
controls.description: Establish and maintain a secure network architecture.

controls.title: Securely Manage Network Infrastructure
controls.description: Securely manage network infrastructure using secure protocols.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain Architecture Diagrams
controls.description: Establish and maintain architecture diagrams of the enterprise network.

controls.title: Centralize Network Authentication, Authorization, and Auditing
controls.description: Centralize network authentication, authorization, and auditing.

controls.title: Use of Secure Network Management and Communication Protocols
controls.description: Use secure network management and communication protocols.

controls.title: Centralize Network Logs
controls.description: Centralize network logs.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain Dedicated Computing Environments
controls.description: Establish and maintain dedicated computing environments for network administration.

implementationGroups.name: Network Monitoring and Defense
implementationGroups.description: Operate processes and tooling to establish and maintain comprehensive network monitoring and defense against security threats across the enterprise's network and endpoints.

controls.title: Centralize Security Event Alerting
controls.description: Centralize security event alerting.

controls.title: Deploy a Host-Based Intrusion Detection Solution
controls.description: Deploy a host-based intrusion detection solution.

controls.title: Deploy a Network Intrusion Detection Solution
controls.description: Deploy a network intrusion detection solution.

controls.title: Perform Traffic Filtering Between Network Segments
controls.description: Perform traffic filtering between network segments.

controls.title: Manage Access Control for Remote Assets
controls.description: Manage access control for remote assets.

controls.title: Collect Network Traffic Flow Logs
controls.description: Collect network traffic flow logs.

controls.title: Deploy a Host-Based Firewall
controls.description: Deploy a host-based firewall on all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Deploy a Network-Level Spam Filter
controls.description: Deploy a network-level spam filter.

controls.title: Perform Application Layer Filtering
controls.description: Perform application layer filtering.

controls.title: Deploy a Network Intrusion Prevention Solution
controls.description: Deploy a network intrusion prevention solution.

controls.title: Deploy Port-Level Access Control
controls.description: Deploy port-level access control.

controls.title: Deploy an Endpoint Detection and Response Solution
controls.description: Deploy an endpoint detection and response solution.

controls.title: Deploy a Network Detection and Response Solution
controls.description: Deploy a network detection and response solution.

implementationGroups.name: Security Awareness and Skills Training
implementationGroups.description: Establish and maintain a security awareness program to influence behavior among the workforce with regard to cybersecurity.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Security Awareness Program
controls.description: Establish and maintain a security awareness program.

controls.title: Train Workforce Members to Recognize Social Engineering Attacks
controls.description: Train workforce members to recognize social engineering attacks.

controls.title: Train Workforce Members on Authentication Best Practices
controls.description: Train workforce members on authentication best practices.

controls.title: Train Workforce on Data Handling Best Practices
controls.description: Train workforce on data handling best practices.

controls.title: Train Workforce Members on Causes of Unintentional Data Exposure
controls.description: Train workforce members on causes of unintentional data exposure.

controls.title: Train Workforce Members of Threats and Risks
controls.description: Train workforce members of threats and risks.

controls.title: Train Workforce on How to Identify and Report if Their Enterprise Assets are Missing Security Updates
controls.description: Train workforce on how to identify and report if their enterprise assets are missing security updates.

controls.title: Train Workforce on the Dangers of Connecting to and Transmitting Enterprise Data Over Insecure Networks
controls.description: Train workforce on the dangers of connecting to and transmitting enterprise data over insecure networks.

implementationGroups.name: Service Provider Management
implementationGroups.description: Develop a process to evaluate service providers (i.e., external parties with access to the enterprise's data and/or enterprise assets), hold them to a security standard consistent with the enterprise's information security strategy, and monitor them on an ongoing basis.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Service Providers
controls.description: Establish and maintain an inventory of service providers.

controls.title: Establish and Maintain a Service Provider Management Policy
controls.description: Establish and maintain a service provider management policy.

controls.title: Classify Service Providers
controls.description: Classify service providers based on the level of access they have to enterprise data and assets.

controls.title: Ensure Service Provider Contracts Include Security Requirements
controls.description: Ensure service provider contracts include security requirements.

controls.title: Assess Service Providers
controls.description: Assess service providers on an ongoing basis.

controls.title: Monitor Service Providers
controls.description: Monitor service providers on an ongoing basis.

controls.title: Terminate Service Provider Access
controls.description: Terminate service provider access when no longer needed.

implementationGroups.description: Manage the security life cycle of all in-development, custom, and third-party software to reduce the number of vulnerabilities before deployment.

controls.description: Establish and manage an application software security inventory.

controls.description: Establish and manage an application software security policy.

controls.description: Leverage vetted modules or services for application security controls.

controls.description: Implement code-level security checks.

controls.description: Perform penetration testing for applications.

implementationGroups.description: Establish a program to develop and maintain an incident response capability (e.g., plans, procedures, tools, and staffing) in order to respond to incidents.

controls.description: Designate personnel to manage incident handling.
